ideation: This sequence depicts a superhero pose, starting with arms at the sides and culminating in a powerful, confident stance.  The movement is deliberate and emphasizes strength.  The left arm will primarily move, while the right arm provides a counterpoint. Frame 1 shows arms at rest, ready for action. Frame 2 initiates a left-arm upward movement, mimicking a superhero's readiness. Frame 3 shows the left arm nearly at its peak, ready to strike a pose. Frame 4 shows the final superhero pose, with the left arm high and the right arm slightly back for balance. Frame 5 shows the hero returning to a neutral pose after striking a pose.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, ready for action
left arm begins to rise, a heroic ascent
left arm reaches skyward, gathering strength
superhero pose struck, left arm high, right balanced
arms return to a neutral, ready stance
